hero.description: Trusted real estate consultancy connecting buyers with verified residential plots, premium villas, and modern apartments — with full legal transparency.

form.title: Interested?
form.subtitle: Drop your details and we'll get back with the best matching properties.

portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: Handpicked residential developments across Lucknow's prime corridors — all RERA registered.

services.title: End-to-End Advisory
services.description: From shortlisting to key handover — we manage every step so you can focus on your decision.

buy.title: Buy Property
buy.desc: Filter verified properties by location, type, and budget. Every listing includes RERA ID, pricing, and legal clearance status — no hidden information.

visit.title: Schedule Site Visit
visit.desc: Book a guided property walkthrough at a time that suits you. Our agents manage the logistics — transport, entry, and documentation.

loan.title: Loan Advisory
loan.desc: Access fair, unbiased home loan guidance from partner banks. We compare rates, process documents, and accelerate approvals without upfront fees.

trust.description: Every property listed on our platform goes through a structured verification process. We believe that buyers deserve full legal clarity before committing to any transaction.

rera.title: RERA Registration Verified
rera.desc: Every project carries its UP-RERA registration number, directly linked to the regulatory database.

legal.title: Title & Legal Clearance
legal.desc: Encumbrance status, occupancy certificates, and land-use documents reviewed before listing.

banks.title: Bank-Approved Projects
banks.desc: Listings include loan eligibility — SBI, HDFC, ICICI — reducing financing friction.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.desc: Base price, price per sqft, stamp duty estimates, and GST shown upfront — no hidden costs.

steps.oneDesc: Tell us your location, budget, and property type preference.
steps.twoDesc: We match you with verified properties that fit your exact criteria.
steps.threeDesc: We arrange and escort you through the property walkthrough.
steps.fourDesc: We assist with documentation, loan processing, and final registration.

proof.title: Companies We've Worked With
proof.description: Builder partnerships, published listings, and proof-led case studies now live inside the same Homes system, so every brand mention can connect back to real inventory and enquiry conversion.

enquiry.description: Tell us what you're looking for. Our advisors will match you with verified properties and arrange a site visit within 48 hours.
